message:
Command `
echo "=== DRT check $(date) ==="
stat "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
tail -15 "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED"
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2, "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}'
ls -la "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^d" | tail -8
` executed with exit code 0.
